statement: This is an author-led preprint and has not yet undergone journal peer review.
required_caveat: Do not describe as peer reviewed.

statement: The code, validation ledgers, checksums, and staged artifacts are publicly available for verification at https://github.com/jrmerwin/two_clocks_distinction_combinatorial.git.
required_caveat: Availability is not the same as external review.

statement: The staged analysis reports a caveated DEU posterior summary and matched DEU/native comparison.
required_caveat: State the likelihood scope and TT_lite exclusion.

statement: The independent-validation estimator result may be reported as an author-led internal validation result with caveats.
required_caveat: Do not call it peer-reviewed evidence.

statement: Readers can inspect and rerun the public verification package using the provided reproduction commands.
required_caveat: No guarantee of third-party review completion.
